_about: Machine manifest for the Mycelium GitHub Project (v2) board. The declarative source consumed by gh-issues-sync.py --project (via `gh api graphql`). Companion human doc: project-v2-spec.md. House rules: create-if-absent + update-to-match + never-silent (G2). Custom fields + single-select options + items/field-values are reconciled over the API; views + built-in workflows are settings-only (not API-writable) — their intent is recorded here and the run FLAGS them as manual steps, never silently skipped.

project.title: Mycelium
project.description: Design → build tracking for the Mycelium language.

fields.name: Status
fields._note: GitHub seeds a built-in Status on new projects (Todo/In Progress/Done). Reuse it by name; reconcile adds the missing In Review / Blocked options.

fields.name: Area
fields._note: Mirrors the area:* labels in labels.json (option name = label minus the 'area:' prefix).

fields.name: Estimate
fields._note: Optional sizing; set from the planning docs when a size is given, else left blank (never invented).

field_label_map._about: How an item's labels set its single-select field values. The engine resolves each rule to an option id and writes it only when it differs from the item's current value (idempotent). An unmapped label is reported, never invented (G2).

Status._note: Only these explicit status labels override Status. status:needs-design has no Status option (the workflow's item-added→Todo default stands); it is reported as unmapped, never guessed.

views.name: Board
views._note: Day-to-day Kanban. View layout/grouping is settings-only — create + configure in the project UI.

automation.intent: Auto-add items from tzervas/mycelium that carry any phase:* label.
automation.where: Project → Settings → Workflows → Auto-add to project (filter: repo:tzervas/mycelium label:phase:*)

automation.intent: When an item is added → set Status = Todo.
automation.where: Project → Settings → Workflows → Item added to project

automation.intent: When an issue is closed / a PR is merged → set Status = Done.
automation.where: Project → Settings → Workflows → Item closed (and Pull request merged)

automation.intent: When the status:blocked label is added → set Status = Blocked.
automation.where: Project → Settings → Workflows (a label-triggered workflow; configure in the UI)
